prompt: Create a block plugin module called content_recommendations for our Drupal 10 Open Social site. The block should display recommended content items. It needs to inject a service for fetching recommendations via dependency injection. The block should have a configuration option for how many items to show (default: 5). Include proper block configuration form and default configuration. We want D11 compatibility.
notes: Both produce correct block plugin code with 4-param create(), 3-param parent::__construct(), blockForm/blockSubmit, defaultConfiguration, D11 #[Block] attribute, and #cache metadata. Without-skill was arguably more thorough (parent::blockForm/blockSubmit calls, cache contexts). Block DI patterns are well within Sonnet training data.
